zh.lifeSummary: 當Marian FitzWalter於大約1161年出生在英國艾可蕾托 登莫福時，她的父親Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow38歲，母親Mathilda de Lucy26歲。她和William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1214年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marian FitzWalter于大约1161年出生在英国艾可蕾托 登莫福时，她的父亲Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow38岁，母亲Mathilda de Lucy26岁。她和William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire至少有1个女儿。她去世于大约1214年在英国英格兰賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWalter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , ‘son of Walter’.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Marian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval variant spelling of   Marion .  However, in the 18th century, when combined names began to come into fashion, it was sometimes understood as a combination of   Mary   and   Ann .

en.lifeSummary: When Marian FitzWalter was born about 1161, in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, her father, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, was 38 and her mother, Mathilda de Lucy, was 26. She had at least 1 daughter with William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire. She died about 1214, in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marian FitzWalter est née environ 1161, à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mathilda de Lucy, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire. Elle est décédée environ 1214, à Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marian FitzWalter um 1161 in Little Dunmow, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow 38 und ihre Mutter Mathilda de Lucy 26. Sie hatte mit William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1214 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marian FitzWalter è nata il circa 1161 nel Little Dunmow, Essex, England, sua padre, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mathilda de Lucy, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire. Morì circa 1214, nel Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marian FitzWalterが約1161年にイギリスエセックスリットル ダンモウで生まれた時，父Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmowは38歳，母Mathilda de Lucyは26歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshireとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1214年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークハムステドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marian FitzWalter(이)가 대략 1161년 영국 에세스 리틀 던모에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda de Lucy(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 버카스테드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marian FitzWalter nasceu aproximadamente 1161, em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda de Lucy, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1214, em Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marian FitzWalter родилась около 1161 г. в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter FitzRobert 2nd Lord of Little Dunmow было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda de Lucy, 26. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от William de Lovetot Lord of Hallamshire. Она умерла около 1214 г. в местности бирхамстед, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
